_source_note: Curated subset of MITRE ATT&CK Enterprise techniques for the Credential Access tactic (TA0006), plus one Lateral Movement technique (T1550.002).

techniques.name: OS Credential Dumping: LSASS Memory
techniques.description: Adversaries may attempt to access credential material stored in the process memory of LSASS.

techniques.name: OS Credential Dumping: Security Account Manager
techniques.description: Adversaries may attempt to extract credential material from the SAM database.
data_sources: Windows Registry: Windows Registry Key Access

techniques.name: OS Credential Dumping: NTDS
techniques.description: Adversaries may attempt to access or create a copy of the Active Directory domain database (NTDS.dit).

techniques.name: OS Credential Dumping: DCSync
techniques.description: Adversaries may use a directory replication service to obtain credential material from a domain controller.
data_sources: Active Directory: Active Directory Object Access

techniques.name: Brute Force
techniques.description: Adversaries may use brute force techniques to gain access to accounts.

techniques.name: Unsecured Credentials: Credentials In Files
techniques.description: Adversaries may search file systems for insecurely stored credentials.

techniques.name: Credentials from Password Stores: Credentials from Web Browsers
techniques.description: Adversaries may acquire credentials from web browsers.

techniques.name: Steal or Forge Kerberos Tickets: Kerberoasting
techniques.description: Adversaries may obtain TGS tickets vulnerable to offline cracking.

techniques.name: Steal or Forge Kerberos Tickets: AS-REP Roasting
techniques.description: Adversaries may obtain TGT responses for accounts without Kerberos pre-authentication.

techniques.name: Forced Authentication
techniques.description: Adversaries may gather credential material by forcing a user to authenticate through an intercepted mechanism.

techniques.name: Modify Authentication Process
techniques.description: Adversaries may modify authentication mechanisms to access credentials.
data_sources: Windows Registry: Windows Registry Key Modification

techniques.name: Use Alternate Authentication Material: Pass the Hash
techniques.description: Adversaries may pass the hash using stolen password hashes to move laterally.
